title: User login success with valid credentials
description: Verify that users can successfully log in using valid credentials and that their session and roles are correctly stored.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Input valid username/email and password
Click login button
Check the user is redirected to the homepage/dashboard
Verify user session details and roles are stored in local storage

title: User login fails with invalid credentials
description: Verify that login fails when invalid username/email or password is used and that appropriate error messages are displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Input invalid username/email or password
Click login button
Check that login is denied
Verify an appropriate error message is shown to the user

title: Role-based module visibility and access control
description: Verify that modules shown in the sidebar are properly filtered based on the user's role and assigned units/modules, and RLS policies are enforced.

steps.description: Log in as super_admin user with multiple units
Verify all modules are visible and accessible
Log in as admin user with restricted modules on assigned units
Verify only assigned modules appear in sidebar and are accessible
Log in as user role with limited permissions
Verify modules visibility honors role and unit permissions
Attempt to access unauthorized module URL directly
Verify access is denied and user is shown an appropriate error or redirected

title: Unit Management CRUD operations by admin
description: Verify admins can create, read, update, and delete units including management of keys, modules, and subscription plans with correct permission validations.

steps.description: Log in as admin user
Navigate to Unit Management page
Create a new unit with valid details
Verify unit is created and appears in the units list
Edit existing unit details including modules and subscription plans
Verify changes are saved and reflected correctly
Delete a non-critical unit
Verify the unit is removed from the system
Attempt to manage unit keys as admin (not super_admin)
Verify access is denied to modify unit keys

title: Unit Keys management by super_admin with safety validations
description: Verify super_admin can add, rename, deactivate, and delete custom configuration columns for units with validations preventing invalid or duplicate column names and real-time update reflection.

steps.description: Log in as super_admin
Navigate to Unit Keys Administration page
Add a new custom key with a valid unique name
Verify the key is added and visible in configuration
Attempt to add a custom key with a duplicate name
Verify the system prevents this with a proper error message
Attempt to rename a key to an invalid or duplicate name
Verify operation is prevented with validation error
Deactivate an existing unit key
Verify the key status changes appropriately and is respected in units
Delete a unit key
Verify the key is removed and changes propagate in realtime

title: Upload pipeline processing XLSX files with multi-professional expansion
description: Verify that upload and processing pipeline correctly processes XLSX spreadsheet uploads with multi-professional expansions, automatic wait-status logic, and efficient batch RPC calls without duplicate or obsolete data.

steps.description: Log in as authorized user
Navigate to upload section
Upload a valid XLSX file containing multiple professionals
Verify data is processed correctly with expansions per professional
Verify status fields are automatically set to wait status where applicable
Verify batch RPC calls execute without duplicates
Verify obsolete data is cleaned from the system after processing
Upload malformed or corrupted XLSX file
Verify appropriate error handling and user feedback are presented

title: Post-sales records automatic creation and bidirectional synchronization
description: Verify that post-sales entries are automatically created from processed data and that statuses synchronize bidirectionally with the processed data table correctly and without data inconsistency.

steps.description: Upload valid processed data
Verify post-sales records are automatically created corresponding to relevant processed data entries
Update status in post-sales records
Verify the status change synchronizes back correctly to the processed data entries
Update status in processed data entries
Verify the status changes synchronize forward correctly to post-sales records

title: Appointment scheduling and realtime updates
description: Verify users can create, view, update, and delete service appointments and that all changes propagate in realtime across different clients.

steps.description: Log in as authorized user
Navigate to Appointments page
Create a new appointment with valid data
Verify appointment is created and visible immediately
Open the same Appointments page in a second browser as another user
Edit or delete the appointment in the first browser
Verify changes are reflected realtime in the second browser without page refresh

title: Financial dashboard KPIs and monthly trend visualizations
description: Verify detailed financial KPIs (total revenue, average ticket, repasses, margin metrics) and monthly trends are accurately displayed and match expected business logic including submetric drill-downs.

steps.description: Log in and navigate to Financial Dashboard
Verify total revenue, average ticket, repasses, margin KPIs display accurate values as per backend data
Verify monthly trends visualizations show correct graphs matching expected data
Click on submetric drill-downs
Verify detailed submetric data is displayed accurately and consistently

title: Activity and webhook logging system captures metadata with performance indexing
description: Verify all module access actions and external webhook (N8N) workflows are logged with complete metadata and that the logs table is optimally indexed for performance and secure access.

steps.description: Perform various module accesses and workflow operations
Verify logs are generated with correct metadata (timestamps, user info, module names)
Verify webhook executions with details are logged
Query logs with filters
Verify performance is acceptable and filtering is accurate

title: User and access management updates modules per unit and user reflecting hierarchical permissions
description: Verify the admin interface correctly assigns and restricts modules per user and unit with proper updates to database tables using delete/insert logic and generates logs of changes.

steps.description: Log in as admin
Navigate to User and Access Management page
Assign new modules to a user for a specific unit
Verify the modules are updated in the database correctly
Remove modules from a user/unit and save
Verify entries are deleted and inserted accordingly without inconsistency
Check logs reflect the permission changes with correct metadata

title: Kanban board drag and drop with optimistic updates and synchronization
description: Verify the commercial module Kanban board supports drag and drop of sales opportunities, with immediate optimistic UI updates and trigger-based synchronization that updates related client data accordingly.

steps.description: Log in as user with commercial module access
Navigate to commercial Kanban board
Drag a sales opportunity card to a different column
Verify UI updates immediately without delay
Verify backend triggers update related client data correctly after the move
Simulate network delay or error during update
Verify UI rollback or appropriate error feedback is displayed if update fails

title: Security validations including SQL injection and input sanitation
description: Verify all RPC calls, service layers, and input forms properly enforce security validations preventing SQL injection and ensure data integrity.

steps.description: Attempt to inject SQL via input fields and RPC calls
Verify the system sanitizes inputs and queries to prevent injection
Submit invalid or malicious inputs to dynamic columns and forms
Verify inputs are rejected or sanitized appropriately with error feedback

title: Confirmation modals appear for destructive actions
description: Verify that any destructive actions such as deleting units, keys, or client records require user confirmation via modals before processing.

steps.description: Attempt to delete a unit
Verify a confirmation modal appears requiring user confirmation
Cancel deletion in modal
Verify deletion is aborted
Confirm deletion in modal
Verify unit is deleted successfully

title: Multi-unit aggregated views respect filtering and data integrity
description: Verify aggregated views that combine listings and metrics from multiple units respect user filters, permissions, and data integrity rules with correct merging and no data leakage.

steps.description: Log in as user with access to multiple units
Navigate to multi-unit aggregated view with 'ALL' option selected
Verify data is correctly merged from all accessible units
Apply unit filters
Verify filtered data matches selected units without leakage
Attempt to access data from unauthorized units
Verify access is denied and no data is shown from these units

title: Frontend layouts and interactions follow TailwindCSS and accessibility guidelines
description: Verify that UI elements follow TailwindCSS styling conventions and accessibility best practices including keyboard navigation and screen reader support.

steps.description: Navigate throughout the application pages
Verify UI styles conform to TailwindCSS design specifications
Use keyboard navigation to traverse all interactive components
Verify focus states and tab order are logical and visible
Use screen reader to check for aria-labels and descriptive text on key elements

title: System builds and deploys successfully in Node v18+ and NPM 9+
description: Verify the full system can be built and deployed successfully in the specified environment (Node v18+ and NPM 9+) following the documented process.

steps.description: Clone repository and install dependencies with NPM 9+
Run build command for production
Verify build completes without errors
Deploy built application to test environment
Verify application runs correctly post-deployment
